allow: Bash(" test/*.rb | head -20; echo "---TESTLINES---"; wc -l test/*.rb)
Bash(grep -rn "sync-agent-config\\|ruby\\|system\\|backtick\\|`" test/*.rb | head -20; echo "---TESTLINES---"; wc -l test/*.rb)

Bash(bash -c 'source /tmp/rt_funcs.sh; for c in auto ruby node python; do r="$\(resolve_runtime "$c"\)"; echo "$c -> runtime=$r template=$\(runtime_template "$r"\) interp=$\(runtime_interpreter "$r"\)"; done')
